    "displayName": "Spotlight",
    "logicDescriptions": {
      "Power": {
        "dataType": "Float",
        "range": "0+ W",

      },

        "range": "0-1",

      },

        "dataType": "Float",

        "description": "Vertical tilt angle in degrees. Read and write."
      },
      "Horizontal": {
        "dataType": "Float",
        "range": "0-360°",
        "description": "Horizontal rotation angle in degrees. Read and write."
      },
      "RequiredPower": {
        "dataType": "Float",
        "range": "0+ W",
        "description": "Power required for operation in watts."
      }
    }
  },
  {
    "deviceKey": "ThingStructureStacker",
    "displayName": "Stacker",
    "logicDescriptions": {
      "Power": {
        "dataType": "Float",
        "range": "0+ W",
        "description": "Current power consumption in watts."
      },
      "On": {
        "dataType": "Boolean",
        "range": "0-1",
        "description": "1 if stacker is enabled. Read and write."
      },
      "Mode": {
        "dataType": "Integer",
        "range": "0-2",
        "description": "0 = Auto, 1 = Import, 2 = Export. Read and write."
      },
      "Lock": {
        "dataType": "Boolean",
        "range": "0-1",
        "description": "1 if stacker is locked. Read and write."
      },
      "Activate": {

        "range": "0-1",
        "description": "Trigger to manually transfer items. Read and write."
      },

        "range": "0+",
        "description": "Target quantity for stacking operations. Read and write."
      },
      "Output": {
        "dataType": "Boolean",
        "range": "0-1",
        "description": "1 if actively transferring items."

  {
    "deviceKey": "ThingStructureSmallSatelliteDish",
    "displayName": "Small Satellite Dish",
    "logicDescriptions": {
      "Power": {
        "dataType": "Float",
        "range": "0+ W",
        "description": "Current power consumption in watts."
      },
      "Error": {
        "dataType": "Boolean",
        "range": "0-1",
        "description": "1 if device has an error."
      },
      "Activate": {
        "dataType": "Boolean",
        "range": "0-1",
        "description": "Trigger to begin contacting strongest signal. Read and write."
      },
      "Setting": {
        "dataType": "Integer",
        "range": "50-200 W",
        "description": "Output wattage for communications. Read and write."
      },
      "Horizontal": {
        "dataType": "Float",
        "range": "0-360°",
        "description": "Horizontal rotation angle in degrees. Read and write."
      },
      "Vertical": {
        "dataType": "Float",
        "range": "0-90°",
        "description": "Vertical tilt angle in degrees. Read and write."
      },
      "On": {
        "dataType": "Boolean",
        "range": "0-1",
        "description": "1 if device is powered on. Read and write."
      },
      "RequiredPower": {
        "dataType": "Float",
        "range": "0+ W",
        "description": "Power required for operation in watts."
      },
      "Idle": {
        "dataType": "Boolean",
        "range": "0-1",
        "description": "1 if dish is not moving."
      },
      "SignalStrength": {
        "dataType": "Float",
        "range": "-1 or 0-180°",
        "description": "Degrees off-axis to strongest contact. -1 if not resolved."
      },
      "SignalID": {
        "dataType": "Hash",
        "range": "Reference ID",
        "description": "Reference ID of strongest detected contact, or -1 if none."
      },
      "InterrogationProgress": {
        "dataType": "Float",
        "range": "-1 to 1",
        "description": "Contact interrogation progress. -1 if none, 1 if contacted."
      },
      "TargetPadIndex": {
        "dataType": "Integer",
        "range": "0+",
        "description": "Index of target landing pad on data network. Read and write."
      },
      "SizeX": {
        "dataType": "Integer",
        "range": "-1 or 0+",
        "description": "Required landing pad X size for contact. -1 if not resolved."
      },
      "SizeZ": {
        "dataType": "Integer",
        "range": "-1 or 0+",
        "description": "Required landing pad Z size for contact. -1 if not resolved."
      },
      "MinimumWattsToContact": {
        "dataType": "Float",
        "range": "-1 or 0+ W",
        "description": "Minimum watts needed to contact signal. -1 if not resolved."
      },
      "WattsReachingContact": {
        "dataType": "Float",
        "range": "-1 or 0+ W",
        "description": "Actual watts reaching contact. -1 if not resolved."
      },
      "ContactTypeId": {
        "dataType": "Hash",
        "range": "Trader ID hash",
        "description": "Trader type ID hash of strongest contact, or 0 if none."
      },
      "BestContactFilter": {
        "dataType": "Hash",
        "range": "Reference ID",
        "description": "Filter to prioritize specific contact by reference ID. -1 for no filter. Read and write."
      }
    }
  },
